name: AF2Rave
description: Generates diverse protein structures using reduced MSA AlphaFold2. Learns reaction coordinates with SPIB for enhanced sampling and Boltzmann-ranked ensembles.
capabilities: Generates diverse protein structures using reduced MSA AlphaFold2
Learns reaction coordinates with SPIB for enhanced sampling and Boltzmann-ranked ensembles

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for diverse structure generation using reduced MSA AlphaFold2
